plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow plugin with practical guidance for commit readiness, Conventional Commit drafting, staged-change hygiene, and template-aware GitHub pull request or GitLab merge request body drafting.

interface.shortDescription: Commit readiness, Conventional Commit drafting, and template-aware PR/MR body drafting.

plugins.name: java
plugins.description: Java development plugin with practical skills for syntax boundaries, language design, testing workflows, dependency decisions, performance analysis, and JDTLS-assisted editing.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Java syntax, design, testing, performance, and JDTLS workflows.

plugins.name: jvm
plugins.description: JVM development assistant with shared skills for tooling workflows, runtime diagnostics, and garbage-collection guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Shared JVM tooling, runtime diagnostics, and GC workflows.

plugins.name: kotlin
plugins.description: Kotlin development plugin with practical skills for idiomatic language design, coroutines and Flow decisions, Kotlin testing workflows, and kotlin-lsp-assisted editing.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Kotlin language, coroutine, testing, and kotlin-lsp workflows.

plugins.name: spring
plugins.description: Spring development plugin with practical skills for Spring Boot, Web, Data, transactions, observability, Batch, Integration, Cloud, and Kafka workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Spring Boot, Web, Data, transaction, observability, Batch, Integration, Cloud, and Kafka skills.

plugins.name: observability-assets
plugins.description: Prometheus and Grafana plugin with practical skills for alert-rule design, recording-rule support, promtool validation, dashboard JSON authoring, and Grafana mixin workflows for version-controlled observability assets.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Prometheus alerting, recording rules, promtool, Grafana dashboard, and mixin workflows.

plugins.name: reactor
plugins.description: Project Reactor plugin with practical skills for Flux and Mono composition, scheduler selection, Sinks and ConnectableFlux hot-source design, and reactor-test workflows with StepVerifier, TestPublisher, PublisherProbe, and virtual time.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Project Reactor composition, scheduling, sinks, hot-source, and reactor-test workflows.

plugins.name: netty
plugins.description: Netty and Reactor Netty plugin with practical skills for high-performance network applications, bootstrap and pipeline design, ByteBuf and codec handling, and reactive HTTP/TCP/UDP workflows with Reactor Netty.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Netty bootstrap, pipelines, ByteBuf or codec work, and reactive HTTP/TCP/UDP workflows.

plugins.name: harness-engineering
plugins.description: Agent-first repository design with progressive disclosure, architecture enforcement, and entropy management for AI agent development.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-first repository design with progressive disclosure, architecture enforcement, and entropy management.

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Spec-first workflow: research unknowns, write abstract requirements in SPEC.md, get approval, implement, verify completeness.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-first workflow with research, SPEC.md authoring, review gates, and validation.

plugins.name: agent-capability-kit
plugins.description: Authoring kit for Claude Code plugins, agents, commands/prompts, and cross-platform Agent Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Authoring kit for plugins, agents, commands, and cross-platform Agent Skills.
